home.heroSubtitle: SOPHYS LAW FIRM provides legal advisory, non-litigation representation, and dispute resolution for individuals, businesses, and domestic and international investors.
home.beyondLawDesc: We understand that every legal matter is connected to business operations, investment decisions, and development goals. SOPHYS examines legal issues not only through regulations but within the context of operations, objectives, and growth direction — delivering practical, effective, and sustainable solutions.
home.besideYouDesc: We believe a great lawyer is not just an advisor, but a trusted partner. SOPHYS stands beside clients at every stage — from important business decisions to difficult times, crises, or disputes.
home.practiceSubtitle: Comprehensive legal services for businesses, investors, and individuals.
home.clientsSubtitle: SOPHYS LAW FIRM serves businesses, investors, and individuals who need legal support in investment, business operations, transactions, and dispute resolution in Vietnam.
home.newsSubtitle: Legal analysis and updates in FDI, customs, projects, and corporate law.
home.processSubtitle: A clear, transparent workflow — ensuring clients always understand progress and outcomes.

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.desc: Listen to your needs, analyze the situation, and propose an appropriate approach.

step2.title: Legal Analysis
step2.desc: Research regulations, assess risks, and develop a detailed strategy.

step3.title: Implementation
step3.desc: Draft documents, represent in negotiations or litigation per the agreed plan.

step4.title: Follow-up & Support
step4.desc: Report results, provide post-matter advisory, and long-term legal partnership.

home.ctaSubtitle: Contact SOPHYS LAW FIRM — we are ready to partner with you.

about.title: About SOPHYS LAW FIRM
about.subtitle: BEYOND LAW. BESIDE YOU.
about.intro: SOPHYS LAW FIRM is a law firm providing legal advisory, non-litigation representation, and dispute resolution for individuals, businesses, and domestic and international investors.
about.scope: We partner with clients throughout the entire business lifecycle — from investment and company formation, internal governance, commercial transactions, and project implementation to dispute resolution and protection of legitimate rights.
about.commitment: With the motto "BEYOND LAW. BESIDE YOU.", SOPHYS not only provides legal solutions but becomes a trusted partner, helping clients manage risks, protect interests, and achieve sustainable growth.
about.beyondLawDesc: We understand that every legal matter is connected to business operations, investment decisions, and development goals. We go beyond legal opinions to partner in risk management, project implementation, dispute resolution, and building practical, effective, and sustainable solutions.
about.besideYouDesc: We believe a great lawyer is not just an advisor, but a trusted partner. We stand beside clients at every stage, listening, understanding, and protecting legitimate interests with the highest sense of responsibility.
about.valuesDesc: We build long-term partnerships with clients on the foundation of integrity, responsibility, and solid expertise, creating synergies to effectively resolve legal and business challenges.

values.partnership: PARTNERSHIP — Long-term partnership, placing client interests first.
values.integrity: INTEGRITY — Honesty, ethics, and professional standards.
values.synergy: SYNERGY — Effective collaboration, creating value beyond individual solutions.

about.clientsClosing: SOPHYS strives to be a trusted legal partner, accompanying clients in risk management, problem-solving, and sustainable development.
